# Design System Programme Summary — Outstanding Features by Priority

**Date:** 2026-03-05 | **Prepared for:** Team Discussion | **Project Board:** [AZLAN-1](https://github.com/users/ajrmooreuk/projects/28)

4 open epics | 30 outstanding stories | 60% token gap (48/80 hardcoded) | 4 universal categories missing (shadow, opacity, motion, icon)

---

## P0 — Critical

### [Epic 61: Design System Maturity — Token Gap Remediation, Auto-Fill Rules & Slide Deck Generation](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)

8 features, 46 stories | **NEW**

**[F61.1: Token Gap Analysis Engine & Auto-Fill Rules](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 8 stories

Build automated gap scanner + 8 new DR-* rules (BADGE, SERIES, TOOLBAR, SHADOW, OPACITY, MOTION, ICON) that derive ~80% of missing tokens from existing brand primitives. Design Director approves the remaining 20%.

**[F61.2: Auto-Fill Execution & HITL Approval](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 8 stories | Depends: F61.1

Run auto-fill rules across all 5 brands (BAIV, RCS, WWG, PAND, VHF), generate diff previews, Design Director reviews and approves per brand. Updates all `*-ds-instance-v1.0.0.jsonld` files + extraction logs.

**[F61.3: Component Tier Population](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 7 stories | Depends: F61.1

WWG, PAND, VHF have zero component tokens. Define minimum template (Button, Input, Card, Badge, Panel) from BAIV baseline, auto-derive via DR-COMPONENT-001, update DS-ONT to v3.2.0.

**[F61.4: Cross-Brand Standardisation](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 5 stories | Depends: F61.2

Fix VHF spacing naming (xxsml→xs-3xl), add missing line-height tokens, standardise to 4-tier font-weight model. Update DESIGN-TOKEN-MAP.md to v3.0.0 closing the gap summary.

**[F61.5: Token Storage & Resolution (ex-F8.2)](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 4 stories | **Blocked: [Epic 59 F59.1/F59.2](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/840)**

Supabase JSONB tables for tokens + `resolve_token()` 4-tier cascade + runtime brand switching + version history. Rolled from [Epic 8](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/80). Stories: [#110](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/110), [#111](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/111), [#112](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/112), [#113](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/113).

**[F61.6: Agentic Design Workflow (ex-F8.5)](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 4 stories

Agent skills for Figma MCP token extraction, layout management, React/CSS codegen, and PE process gates. Execution engine for auto-fill. Stories: [#122](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/122), [#123](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/123), [#124](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/124), [#125](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/125).

**[F61.7: Token-Branded PPTX Slide Engine](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 8 stories

Build PE-SC-GEN-001 pipeline: VSOM strategy data → SC-DP deck patterns (Strategy, Roadmap, Ask) → pptxgenjs PPTX. Brand tokens control slide colours, fonts, spacing.

**[F61.8: AI-Assisted Slide Content Generation](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | 5 stories | Depends: F61.7

Claude/Gemini integration: pass VSOM/BSC/VP/RRR ontology data + SC-DP pattern → AI generates slide content → merge with branded templates → Design Director approves final deck.

---

### [Epic 59: Platform Database Architecture](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/840) _(DS dependency)_

9 features, 37 stories | P0 Critical

Blocks [Epic 61](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876) F61.5 (token storage) and F61.6 (agentic skills). F59.1 provisions 18 Supabase projects, F59.2 creates migration framework. All other Epic 61 features are independent of Epic 59.

## P1 — High

### [Epic 8: Design-Director](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/80) _(84% complete, 50/59 stories)_

2 features outstanding (rolled to [Epic 61](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)) + 4 backlog stories

**F8.2 → [Epic 61 F61.5](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | Stories [#110](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/110), [#111](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/111), [#112](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/112), [#113](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/113)

Token storage and cascade resolution. Rolled forward — blocked by [Epic 59](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/840) DB layer.

**F8.5 → [Epic 61 F61.6](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876)** | Stories [#122](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/122), [#123](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/123), [#124](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/124), [#125](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/125)

Agentic design skills. Rolled forward — becomes auto-fill execution engine.

**Remaining 8B backlog** (not rolled forward):

- [#100](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/100) — Upgrade azlan-ds-config.json to DS-ONT entity refs
- [#101](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/101) — Figma source metadata as DS-ONT FigmaSource entities
- [#103](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/103) — React provider patterns as DS-ONT DesignComponent instances
- [#105](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/105) — Supabase schema docs with ontology reference columns

### [Epic 44: WWG Design System — MCP Token Re-Extraction & Triad Population](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/631)

W4M-WWG brand needs full token re-extraction from Figma via PE-DS-EXTRACT-002. Component tier population (currently zero) now covered by [Epic 61 F61.3](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876).

---

### [F46.5: Design System Register — DS Artifacts as Registry Entities](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/688)

Register DS instance files, extraction logs, and design rules as first-class entities in `ont-registry-index.json`. Enables registry-driven DS discovery and cascade resolution.

## P2 — Horizon 2

### [Epic 9: Future Design-System Capabilities — Make Kits, Beta & W3C](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/81)

Figma Make kits, W3C Design Tokens Community Group alignment, beta testing programme. Low priority until [Epic 61](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876) closes the immediate 60% gap.

  │ blocks

  └─► F61.6 Agentic Skills (#122-#125)

Epic 61 (#876) — DS Maturity [P0]
  │ rolled from
  ├─► Epic 8 F8.2/F8.5
  │ consumes
  ├─► Epic 43 (closed) — cascade, OO, codegen
  ├─► Epic 18 (closed) — SC-DP deck patterns
  │ feeds

## Discussion Points

1. **Start F61.1 now?** — Auto-fill rules have no [Epic 59](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/840) dependency. Can begin immediately.
2. **HITL workflow** — How should Design Director review auto-generated tokens?
3. **Component baseline** — BAIV (15 tokens) or RCS (56) as template for WWG/PAND/VHF?
4. **Slide deck priority** — Strategy + Roadmap decks P0. Promote Ask Deck?
5. **[Epic 8](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/80) closure** — 84% done, remaining work rolled forward. Close it?
6. **W3C alignment** — [Epic 9](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/81) tracks W3C Design Tokens. Park until [Epic 61](https://github.com/ajrmooreuk/Azlan-EA-AAA/issues/876) closes gaps.
